action: Bound GitHub OIDC discovery and JWKS retrieval inputs before signature verification.
selected_because: The current verification chain validates supplied discovery and JWKS data but did not yet define a fail-closed retrieval boundary; this was the highest-impact non-duplicative Frontier evidence gap after R-007.
finding: Treat discovery and JWKS retrieval as a separate trust boundary. Pin exact GitHub URLs and issuer, reject redirects or URL drift, enforce JSON and byte bounds, require RS256 metadata, and reject malformed, duplicate, excessive, or non-RSA keys before cryptographic verification.
verification: Six deterministic Node test cases are committed; runtime execution remains outstanding.
handoff: Compose a real network adapter using redirect:'error', an abort timeout, bounded streaming body reads, exact response URL checks, and this policy before github-oidc-jwt-verifier.mjs. Retain live provider headers and body digests without storing tokens.
